uplink.description: Periodic frame: full indoor air quality — CO2, climate, VOC, light, occupancy (motion detected), noise, button pressed, IAQ good (CO2 source)
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (0xAD periodic frame); covt(120 ug/m3)->tvocUgM3 extra, IziAir global/source->iaqGlobal/iaqSource extras

uplink.description: Periodic frame: sub-zero temperature, dark room, no occupancy (motion false), button not pressed, IAQ source none
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (0xAD periodic frame)

uplink.description: Periodic frame: CO2 error (16383)/VOC disconnected (16382), light deactivated (1021), noise error (127)/disconnected (126), occupancy disconnected (126), IAQ error — sentinel fields suppressed, climate retained
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; sentinel co2/covt/lux/noise/occupancy/IAQ values suppressed per upstream sensor-absent and Error codes

uplink.description: Wrong product byte (0xAB = Move, not SIGN) returns an error
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder; the shared upstream decoder happily decodes 0xAB as 'Move LoRa' (no product gating), but this is the SIGN codec so the non-0xAD product byte is rejected
